description: An elderly customer wants to designate their daughter to receive a copy of any disconnection notices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Collect the name and contact information for the third party (the daughter).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the third party's details.

nodes.task_description: Add the third party's information to the account with the specific 'disconnection notice' flag.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the account in the CIS.
